Skill_Requirements: Programme delivery; stakeholder management; AWS migration experience; risk management
Justification: Single accountable leader across all phases; ensures continuity and stakeholder alignment; AWS migration experience needed to make informed trade-off decisions

Skill_Requirements: AWS Well-Architected; multi-account strategy; networking (VPN/DX); IaC (Terraform/CDK); security architecture
Justification: Designs target architecture for all apps; needed early for Landing Zone and stays through Dependent phase to ensure consistency; two needed for parallel workstreams

Skill_Requirements: Hadoop; Spark; EMR; Kafka/MSK; NiFi/MWAA; S3 data lake; Cassandra/Keyspaces; data quality frameworks
Justification: Foundation phase is data-heavy (MDM; CDP; Big Data Pipeline); 3 needed for parallel migration of Oracle; Cassandra; Hadoop; reduces to analytics support in Phase 2

Skill_Requirements: DMS; SCT; Oracle; PostgreSQL; SQL Server; MySQL; MongoDB; performance tuning; zero-downtime migration
Justification: Every phase involves database migration; Oracle 12c→RDS; MySQL 5.7→8; SQL Server upgrades; 2 needed for parallel DB work; staggered off as legacy DBs complete

Skill_Requirements: Java 8→17 migration; Spring Boot 3; ECS/EKS deployment; microservices; REST API; Kafka integration
Justification: Core apps (MDM; E-Commerce; Trade Promo; WMS) are Java/Spring Boot; 3 needed for parallel streams; critical for WMS Java 8→17 refactoring in Phase 4

Skill_Requirements: Node.js 18+; React 18; EKS deployment; MongoDB/DocumentDB; event-driven architecture
Justification: Loyalty (Node.js); Procurement (Node.js/React); Store Ops (React); concentrated in Phase 2-3; not needed in Phase 4 (legacy is .NET/Java)

Skill_Requirements: .NET 4.8→8 migration; VB.NET modernisation; SQL Server; IIS→ECS; COM+/DCOM replacement
Justification: PLM (.NET 6); MES (VB.NET 4.8→.NET 8); HR (ASP.NET 4.8); concentrated in later phases; .NET modernisation expertise critical for Strangler Fig pattern

Skill_Requirements: Python 3.11; Scala; FastAPI; Django; SageMaker; Spark; pandas; ML model deployment
Justification: CDP (Python/Scala); Analytics (Python/Scala); Demand Planning (Python/R); Pricing (Python/Scala); QMS (Django); heavy Python presence across Phase 1-3

Skill_Requirements: Terraform/CDK; CI/CD (CodePipeline/GitHub Actions); ECS/EKS; monitoring (CloudWatch/Datadog); containerisation
Justification: Continuous need for infrastructure provisioning; pipeline maintenance; deployment automation; 2 needed for parallel environments and on-call coverage

Skill_Requirements: Incident management; chaos engineering; performance tuning; auto-scaling; cost optimisation; DR automation
Justification: Joins after Landing Zone to own operational excellence; DR drills; load testing; chaos engineering; takes over architecture decisions in Phase 4 from Solutions Architect

Skill_Requirements: Selenium; k6/Locust; API testing; data validation; performance testing; regression suites
Justification: Every phase requires integration testing; load testing; data validation; 2 needed for parallel test execution and continuous regression

Skill_Requirements: IAM; WAF; Shield; encryption (KMS); PCI-DSS; GDPR; penetration testing; compliance automation
Justification: Security baseline from day 1; PCI-DSS for E-Commerce; GDPR for HR; SOX for FP&A; continuous compliance monitoring; single senior resource sufficient with automation

Skill_Requirements: RDS administration; performance tuning; backup/restore; Multi-AZ failover; monitoring; patching
Justification: Operational DBA support once databases start migrating; handles day-to-day RDS operations; patching; performance issues; frees migration DBAs for project work

Skill_Requirements: Agile delivery; JIRA/Azure DevOps; sprint planning; impediment removal; cross-team coordination
Justification: Coordinates 3-4 parallel squads; manages dependencies between teams; ensures delivery cadence; single resource with strong coordination skills

Skill_Requirements: Requirements gathering; data mapping; UAT coordination; stakeholder communication; process documentation
Justification: Captures business requirements; coordinates UAT with business teams; documents processes; not needed in Phase 4 (technical modernisation; no new requirements)

Skill_Requirements: Organisational change; training delivery; communication planning; adoption metrics
Justification: Heaviest change impact in Phase 0-2 (new tools; new processes; cloud adoption); delivers training; manages resistance; offboards once teams are self-sufficient

Skill_Requirements: VPN; Direct Connect; VPC design; Transit Gateway; DNS (Route 53); firewall rules; hybrid connectivity
Justification: Critical for Landing Zone and hybrid connectivity; once network is stable and Foundation apps migrated; not needed full-time; on-call only after Phase 1

Skill_Requirements: Third-party vendor management; API integration; EDI/B2B; contract negotiation; SaaS evaluation
Justification: Kinaxis (Demand Planning); Dassault (PLM); SaaS evaluation for HR/TMS replacement; EDI partner validation for WMS; concentrated in later phases
